results.description: Black eyes and sclera. Not the bruised variety.

results.description: Block additional creatures beyond just the one.

results.description: These cards make something be blocked ... without anything actually doing the blocking.

results.name: blood artist ability
results.description: Cards that have abilities along the lines of: "Whenever creature dies target/each opponent loses 1 life (and you gain 1 life)."

results.description: Vampires sure do drink a lot of red wine huh....WAIT A SECOND

results.name: blood moon effect
results.description: Derived from the titular card, this refers to the effect in which lands lose their land type and/or abilities, being replaced by something else.

results.name: blood petal
results.description: Petals used to depict blood beyond the usual depictions in Innistrad
